metadata.task_title: Use calculator application to perform multiplication
metadata.instruction: Compute the product of 20 and 483 on Calculator
metadata.context: I want to do a multiplication calculation using my the calculator application.

l3.rationale: Removing text input in the Run dialog.

l4.rationale: Opened Calculator from the Run dialog, moving to the Calculator application.

l5.rationale: Search/select the Calculator app before doing the multiplication.
